response.justification: The candidate vastly exceeds the technical bar for an entry-level fullstack role, with strong TypeScript/Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes experience plus relevant LLM/MCP work that maps directly onto the nice-to-have list. The core concern is fit rather than capability: a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience is heavily overqualified for a junior IC position, raising flight-risk and compensation-mismatch questions, and the role requires high on-site presence while the candidate's location signals are ambiguous (Bangalore/Berlin). Relational DB depth also leans MySQL/SQL rather than the preferred PostgreSQL, with MongoDB as the primary recent datastore.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js plus React and AWS (CDK) experience covering full stack
Strong clean-architecture discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development
Directly relevant LLM/MCP and agentic tooling experience (a nice-to-have)
concerns: Significantly overqualified for an entry-level role; retention and salary risk
Primary DB experience is MongoDB/MySQL, not the preferred PostgreSQL
